mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_query.seller_dashboard_flat
AND LOWER(store_name) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{storeName}, '%')) AND gst_verified = CASE WHEN #{kycStatus} = 'VERIFIED' THEN true ELSE false END AND seller_status = CASE WHEN #{active} = true THEN 'ACTIVE' ELSE seller_status END AND seller_status = #{stateId} AND business_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{businessName}, '%') AND tier = #{tier} AND (store_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR business_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR contact_email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%'))
SELECT seller_status as "stateId", COUNT(*) as "count" FROM hm_query.seller_dashboard_flat GROUP BY seller_status

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_query.seller_dashboard_flat
AND seller_id = #{sellerId}

SELECT seller_id as "id", store_name as "storeName", business_name as "businessName", contact_email as "email", contact_phone as "phone", city as "city", state as "state", gstin as "gstin", gst_verified as "gstVerified", pan_verified as "panVerified", bank_account_verified as "bankAccountVerified", tier as "tier", commission_rate as "commissionRate", seller_status as "stateId", health_score as "healthScore", rating as "rating", fulfillment_rate as "fulfillmentRate", total_products as "totalProducts", active_listings as "activeListings", gmv_30d as "gmv30d", orders_30d as "orders30d", revenue_30d as "revenue30d", pending_payout as "pendingPayout", payout_frequency as "payoutFrequency", CASE WHEN seller_status = 'ACTIVE' THEN true ELSE false END as "active", active_date as "createdAt" FROM hm_query.seller_dashboard_flat WHERE seller_id = #{id}
